1850040.name: Fantasy Grounds - Embracing the Void
1850040.description:
Embracing the Void

Embracing the Void contains the following content:
  • CLASSES TOUCHED BY THE VOID - Those who have embraced the Void have shaped the power gained there into formidable weapons; both steel and eldritch alike. Explore new archetypes for the Ranger, Rogue, and Warlock.
  • SPELLS TO EMBRACE THE VOID - The Void is a realm of flowing energies, open to many spell wielders. Ten new spells are sure to give your campaigns a touch of the unknown.
  • ITEMS FROM THE DEEP VOID - There is little that the Void’s grasp can’t influence, these eight magic items included.
  • GM VARIANT RULE: INSANITY - The Void has driven many brave adventurers to the brink of insanity. Now, Game Masters have new rules to utilize.
  • MONSTERS OF THE VOID - A host of monsters that can be found in the Void. Eight new beasties are ready to assault adventurers that stray too far from safety.
  • 5th-LEVEL ADVENTURE - Birth of The Dark Tree is a short adventure that is intended to be run as a one-shot, or dropped into a long running campaign.
Adapted for Fantasy Grounds by: Trevor Armstrong, and Duncan Bachen
Requires: The free Fantasy Grounds virtual tabletop (VTT) software and the included 5E Compatible ruleset.
Screenshots may differ from what you see in-game based on the extension and ruleset you have loaded.
